already_running.message: Topos is already running. Your browser will switch to it.
already_running.title: Topos is already open
cleanup.title: Previous uninstall incomplete
docker.daemon.exhausted_message:
Docker Desktop is still not running after several attempts.

Please start Docker Desktop and open Topos again.
docker.daemon.message:
Docker Desktop needs to be running before Topos can start.

Open Docker Desktop, wait for it to finish starting, then click Retry.
docker.daemon.title: Docker Desktop is not running
docker.missing.explanation: Topos runs in an isolated container. The container system is called Docker and is not yet installed on this computer.
docker.missing.heading: Topos needs Docker Desktop
docker.missing.next_step: After installing Docker Desktop, start it and wait until the whale icon turns blue, then launch Topos again.
docker.missing.title: Docker Desktop not found
env_prep.message:
Topos's configuration could not be prepared. This is usually a file-permissions problem with the Topos folder.

Check that you have write access to the Topos folder and try again.
env_prep.title: Could not prepare Topos
install.building_images: Building Docker images (first time, may take a few minutes)...
install.complete.ok_message:
Topos {version} is installed and running.

Opening http://localhost:{port} in your browser.
install.complete.slow_message:
Topos {version} has been installed.

The application is taking longer than expected to start. It may still be starting in the background.

Open in browser anyway?
install.complete.title: Installation complete
install.failed.message: Topos could not be installed. Check your internet connection and try again.
install.failed.title: Installation failed
install.waiting_health: Waiting for Topos to be ready...
install_prompt.message: Topos is not yet installed on this computer. Install it now?
install_prompt.title: Topos is not installed
moved.invalid_message:
This folder does not look like a Topos installation.

Please choose the folder where you installed Topos.
moved.message:
Topos could not be found at the folder we remembered from last time.

If you moved or renamed the Topos folder, click 'Choose folder' and point to the new location.

If you removed Topos and have not reinstalled it yet, click 'Open install guide'.
moved.title: Topos installation moved
settings.language_restart_notice: Restart the launcher to apply a language change.
settings.title: Settings
stale.message:
This launcher installs Topos {target}, but the latest release is {latest}.

Download a newer launcher to install the current Topos, or continue with this older version if that is what you want.
stale.title: Launcher outdated
start.compose_failed.message:
Topos could not start. This usually happens when another program is using port {port}, or when Docker Desktop is having trouble.

Try the following: close other programs that might use the same port, restart Docker Desktop, then open Topos again.
start.compose_failed.title: Could not start Topos
start.health_timeout.message:
Topos did not finish starting within a minute.

This can happen on the first start when Docker needs to prepare the application for the first time.

Click Retry to wait another minute, or Cancel to shut down.
start.health_timeout.title: Topos is taking longer than expected
uninstall.complete.title: Uninstall complete
uninstall.failed.message: Topos could not be fully removed. Please stop Docker Desktop and close any programs using the Topos folder, then try again.
uninstall.failed.title: Uninstall failed
uninstall.message:
This will remove Topos from:
{path}

This also removes all Docker containers, volumes (book data), and images.

Export your books first if you want to keep them.
Continue?
uninstall.title: Uninstall Topos
update.title: Update available
welcome.docker_required: Topos runs inside Docker, an isolated container system.
welcome.docker_size: Docker Desktop is a free program from Docker Inc., about 800 MB to download and install.
welcome.first_run_size: On first launch, Topos downloads and builds its containers (about 2 GB of disk space, 5-10 minutes).
welcome.guide_link: Read the Topos Docker installation guide
welcome.heading: Before you start
welcome.title: Welcome to Topos
welcome.trust_anchor: Docker is established (since 2013), free, and used by millions of developers worldwide.
